code: import React,{useState}from'react';import'./Booking.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Booking=()=>{const[form,setForm]=useState({name:'',email:'',date:'',time:'',message:''});const handleChange=e=>setForm({...form,[e.target.name]:e.target.value});const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();alert('Thank you for booking!
